microsoft_ft: **Scaled a forward-deployed resilience program** from 2 people to a platformized system, owning end-to-end customer relationships with Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp across 45+ annual drills driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Served as **voice of the customer** across 14 cross-org recovery executions, translating field patterns into shipped product improvements and bridging a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ contract**.

Deployed an internal **AI agent** for drill planning, restructuring workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and scale drill capacity by 21% — automating the most repetitive tasks in the customer engineering function.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience testing capability in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** and establishing a repeatable deployment playbook adopted across the broader program.
microsoft_2023: **Championed adoption** of AI-driven code-generation workflows by running customer-facing demos and training sessions across 14 teams, directly driving utilization and saving **37 engineering hours monthly**.

Identified patterns across 11+ user interviews with Azure service teams to surface critical feature gaps, influencing the product roadmap to ship **intent-based YAML generation** — a direct translation of customer feedback into product.

Automated documentation retrieval by migrating to an AI-powered **semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting customer lookup time by 83% and reducing repetitive support requests.
microsoft_2022: Drove **$3M in accelerated revenue** by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, launching Azure regions 28% faster.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region launch, then built a workflow automation roadmap targeting the highest-impact repetitive tasks across critical deployment paths.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to systematically identify automation gaps and prioritize improvements — establishing a scalable customer engineering feedback loop.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit pilot**, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — delivering a repeatable deployment playbook for future rollouts.

Drove cross-functional alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and eliminating manual release toil.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and prioritized the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and systematically improving team throughput across sprints.
pro_painters: **Owned end-to-end customer relationships** for 200+ monthly proposals — scoping, invoicing, and onboarding — while building a new CRM workflow that increased job bookings by 26% and scaled the customer function without added headcount.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing product positioning across the website and Google profile to better match buyer personas.

Conducted financial analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and improve leadership pricing models, translating customer interaction patterns into systematic improvements to the core business.
